overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval stone village during a stormy dusk. The character carries a lit torch through narrow cobblestone streets before stopping at a wooden railing overlook with panoramic views of distant towers and a forested valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with stone walls and medieval buildings

events.description: passes by a stone fountain in a small village square

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow village streets holding a torch, navigating around obstacles

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden building entrance, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall medieval stone wall running alongside the path
large gnarled tree with thick trunk and sparse branches
irregular stone paving stones forming the walkway
decorative stone fountain with basin in a small square
medieval stone structure with dark roof and small windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks through narrow, winding cobblestone streets of a medieval village during a stormy evening. Stone walls flank the left side while an ancient tree dominates the center view. The torch illuminates the immediate path as the character passes a stone fountain and approaches an open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge approach with wooden railing overlooking valley

events.description: exits narrow village street onto open bridge with panoramic valley view
character stops walking at wooden railing to observe the landscape

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden railing at the overlook and coming to a halt

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence marking the edge of the overlook
tall stone tower with pointed roof visible through the storm haze
ruined tower structure with missing upper sections
abandoned wooden wagon with tattered cloth covering

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character emerges from the narrow streets onto a stone bridge with wooden railings. The view expands to reveal a dramatic valley with distant towers visible through the stormy haze. The character stops at the railing next to an abandoned wooden cart.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with panoramic views of distant towers and forested valley

events.description: camera begins orbiting around stationary character to showcase the view

agents.ego_description: standing still at the railing, holding torch, surveying the stormy landscape and distant architecture

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower with conical roof and waving black flag

segments.scene_description: The character remains stationary at the overlook while the camera orbits around, revealing different angles of the dramatic landscape. The torch casts dynamic shadows as storm clouds swirl overhead. A round tower with a flag becomes visible, while the distant tall tower shifts across the frame as the camera moves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic medieval village that gradually opens into a sweeping panoramic overlook of a stormy valley. It begins by following the character through narrow, winding cobblestone streets flanked by stone walls and an ancient tree, with a lit torch illuminating the path past a stone fountain. As the character emerges from the tight alleyways, the scene expands onto a stone bridge with wooden railings, revealing a dramatic haze-filled valley and distant towers. The camera then comes to a halt beside an abandoned wooden cart, transitioning into a slow orbit around the stationary character. This final movement reveals shifting angles of the landscape, where swirling storm clouds and dynamic torchlight frame a round tower with a waving flag and a distant spire.
